title: Keep Generated Presentation Nonessential
summary: Build and verify css pseudo elements in survey marker and decorative-content audit through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css pseudo elements from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css pseudo elements without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

content.text: Pseudo-elements style generated or selected fragments: ::before and ::after create generated boxes, ::marker styles list markers, ::selection styles selected text, ::placeholder styles placeholder text, and ::first-letter targets a typographic fragment. Generated content can be unavailable, inconsistently exposed, or absent from copied text, so required instructions and status must remain in HTML. Apply it to survey marker and decorative-content audit.
